phasing out

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: phasing out
There is a by-law to limit storage/purchase of trichloroethylene. Wolverine has removed one the their vacuum storage tanks, now is down to 2 tanks.
Baghouse dust was shipped off to landfill site. It contains 0.114 tonne of copper. This was not accounted for in previous reporting years.
Slag was not accounted for in previous years. Slag's composition is 70% copper and 30% carbon.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The facility purchased less scrap and cathode copper in 2007. The facility brought in semi-finished product (i.e. redraw) which does not require casting resulting less copper air release.
Product must have been slightly dirtier in 2006, resulting in more contaminated solvent.
It is not recycled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The product that uses most of this solvent did sell last year, thus the higher consumption.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Although the change from last year was not great for copper, it was a 'rollercoaster'.  We started strong, but during the last 3 months of the year we only produced 1/3 of what we did the first 3 months.
Baghouse dust was shipped off to landfill site. It contains 3.199 tonne of copper.
2,763,351 pounds of slag was shipped offsite for recycle. The slag contains 70% copper i.e. 879.248 tonne of copper was recycled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: A 'rollercoaster' year, where only produced 1/3 of what we in the first 3 months, in the last 3 months.  I'm surprised it didn't have a larger effect.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: See other comments.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Production levels were a real 'rollercoaster' over the year with levels in the final 3 months only being 1/3 of the first 3 months.          2005 report combined Mineral Spirits with Trichlorethylene in the fugitive VOC releases.  This year Mineral Spirit
This year(2006) the Part 5 VOC are not included with the Part 4 VOC releases as they were last year(2005).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Trichloroethylene was replaced by Gardoclean S5699 which contains less volatile organic compounds.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Trichloroethylene is replaced by Gardoclean S5699 which contains less volatile organic compounds.
We were able to contaminate the solvent less frequently, and thus get more life out of it.  Less had to be diposed of.
we don't recycle.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The product that this is used on was a good seller last year.  We may sell even more this year.
13,480 kg of baghouse dust was shipped off for disposal.  The dust contains 70% copper, i.e. 9.436 tonne of copper was disposed.
1,591,051 pounds of slag was shipped off site for recycle.  The slag contains 70% copper, i.e 506.244 tonnes of copper was recycled in 2005.
